Title: Duplicate Advisory: LiteLLM has a sandbox escape in custom-code guardrail
Description:
### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-wxxx-gvqv-xp7p. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
LiteLLM through 2026-04-08 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via bytecode rewriting at the /guardrails/test_custom_code URI.
NotImpacted: All versions before 1.81.8, all versions starting from 1.83.10
